text: I feel a quiet anticipation standing outside this glass-walled gallery. The window reveals a space dedicated to research and development. There is a sense of boundary here—between outside and inside, between observer and participant. I’m drawn by the invitation to enter, to cross from the mundane corridor to a curated world of ideas. The bright lights and reflective surfaces unsettle me slightly, but curiosity wins over: I want to step inside and discover what intellectual experiments await.
